creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: Tim, what do you think of moving current version of yaml-cpp to yaml-cpp03 and updating yaml-cpp to 0.5 instead? There are only 2 consumers of yaml-cpp (chinese/librime, graphics/opencolorio) apart from OpenXCom, and it'd be quite easy to hack them to use yaml-cpp03. New software will likely need new version of the library so I'd like it to be the default one.
